quiz.question: Polymorphism runtime disebut juga?
quiz.explanation: Dynamic binding (atau late binding) adalah polymorphism runtime melalui method overriding.

quiz.question: Reference Animal a = new Dog(); memungkinkan panggilan ke?
options: Method yang didefinisikan di Animal, runtime akan pilih Dog jika override
quiz.explanation: Compile-time type Animal membatasi method yang bisa dipanggil; runtime memanggil implementasi Dog jika method overridden.

quiz.question: Apakah fields subject to polymorphism?
quiz.explanation: Fields tidak polymorphic; field access determined by reference type, not object type.

quiz.question: Kapan method overloading terjadi?
quiz.explanation: Overloading occurs within the same class (or subclass) with different parameter lists.
